CheckTitle: Detect guest or external users excluded from Conditional Access policies
Description: Identifies Conditional Access policies that explicitly exclude guest or external users from enforcement. Guest users excluded from security policies such as MFA or device compliance are left unprotected.
Risk: Excluding guest users from CA policies creates a two-tier security model where external identities bypass protections that internal users are subject to. Attackers target the weakest link — unprotected guest accounts can be used for initial access.

Remediation.Recommendation: Review CA policies that exclude guest users and remove unnecessary exclusions. Create dedicated guest-specific CA policies if different controls are needed for external identities.

SourceNotes: AI-generated framework mappings — verify before citing in compliance reports.
